LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SOUTHERN MARKETING AFFILIATES, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. PUTATIVE DEFENDANT SOUTHERN MARKETING AFFILIATES, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON THE GROUND OF LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION IS CONTINUED TO MAY 17, 2019. DURING THE INTERIM, PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO CONDUCT JURISDICTIONAL DISCOVERY AS REQUESTED. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS SHALL BE FILED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF, MAY 3, 2019, AND PUTATIVE DEFENDANT, MAY 10, 2019. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600 EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SOUTHERN MARKETING AFFILIATES, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

OFF CALENDAR. The case was dismissed on March 18, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153 email: lnajera@sftc.org, Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Continued To May-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SOUTHERN MARKETING AFFILIATES, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Putative defendant Southern Marketing Affiliates, Inc.'s motion to quash service of the summons and complaint on the ground of lack of personal jurisdiction is CONTINUED to May 17, 2019. During the interim, plaintiff is given leave to conduct jurisdictional discovery as requested. Supplemental briefs shall be filed as follows: plaintiff, May 3, 2019, and putative defendant, May 10, 2019.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Off Calendar
